info.name: Axion AI API - Complete Web App
info.description:
# 🚀 Axion AI - YouTube Analytics Platform API

**Complete API documentation for the entire Axion AI web application**

Axion AI is a comprehensive YouTube analytics platform that uses artificial intelligence to analyze video comments, generate insights, and help creators optimize their content strategy.

## 🎯 Platform Features
- **🔍 Sentiment Analysis**: AI-powered comment sentiment analysis
- **💬 Smart Replies**: Generate contextual responses to comments
- **💡 Content Ideas**: AI-driven video topic suggestions
- **📊 Analytics Reports**: Comprehensive performance reports
- **🌍 Multi-language**: Support for 23+ Indian languages
- **📺 YouTube Integration**: Seamless channel connection
- **👥 User Management**: Complete authentication and profile system
- **⚙️ Settings**: Customizable user preferences

## 🔧 Technical Architecture
```
Frontend: Next.js 14 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS
Backend: Next.js API Routes + TypeScript
Database: MongoDB + Mongoose ODM
Authentication: JWT + Cookies
AI/ML: OpenAI GPT + Custom NLP Models
Integration: YouTube Data API v3 + OAuth 2.0
Deployment: Vercel + MongoDB Atlas
```

## 🔐 Authentication System
- **JWT Tokens**: Secure authentication with 7-day expiration
- **Cookie Storage**: HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite protection
- **Password Security**: Bcrypt hashing with 12 rounds
- **Session Management**: Automatic token refresh and logout

## 🌐 API Base URLs
```
Development: http://localhost:3000
Production: https://api.axionix.ai
```

## 📈 Rate Limits by Plan
- **Free**: 100 requests/hour
- **Pro**: 1,000 requests/hour
- **Agency**: 10,000 requests/hour

## 🛡️ Security Features
- ✅ HTTPS enforcement in production
- ✅ Input validation and sanitization
- ✅ SQL injection prevention
- ✅ XSS protection
- ✅ CSRF protection with state tokens
- ✅ Rate limiting on all endpoints
- ✅ Environment-based configuration

## 📞 Support & Resources
- **API Support**: api-support@axionix.ai
- **Documentation**: This Postman collection
- **Status Page**: https://status.axionix.ai
- **Developer Discord**: https://discord.gg/axionai

item.name: 🔐 Authentication System
item.description:
## User Authentication & Authorization

Complete authentication system with registration, login, logout, and session management.

### 🔄 Authentication Flow
1. **Register** → Create account + JWT token
2. **Login** → Validate credentials + Set cookie
3. **Protected Routes** → Auto-include JWT token
4. **Logout** → Clear cookie + Invalidate session

### 🍪 Cookie Configuration
- **Name**: `axion_auth`
- **Type**: HttpOnly + Secure (production)
- **Duration**: 7 days
- **SameSite**: Lax

request.description:
### 📝 Register New User Account

Creates a new user account with automatic JWT token generation.

#### ✅ Request Body
```json
{
  "name": "string (2-50 chars)",
  "email": "string (valid email)",
  "password": "string (min 6 chars)"
}
```

#### 📤 Response (201 Created)
```json
{
  "message": "Account created successfully",
  "user": {
    "name": "John Doe",
    "email": "john@example.com"
  }
}
```

#### 🍪 Cookie Set
- **axion_auth**: JWT token (7 days)

#### ⚠️ Error Responses
- **400**: Missing fields or invalid password
- **409**: Email already exists
- **500**: Server error

### 🔐 User Login

Authenticates user credentials and sets JWT cookie.

#### ✅ Request Body
```json
{
  "email": "string",
  "password": "string"
}
```

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "message": "Logged in successfully",
  "user": {
    "name": "John Doe",
    "email": "john@example.com"
  }
}
```

#### 🍪 Cookie Set
- **axion_auth**: JWT token (7 days)

#### ⚠️ Error Responses
- **400**: Missing email/password
- **401**: Invalid credentials
- **500**: Server error

### 🚪 User Logout

Clears authentication cookie and terminates session.

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "message": "Logged out successfully"
}
```

#### 🍪 Cookie Cleared
- **axion_auth**: Expired and removed

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required (auto-included from cookie)

### 👤 Get Authenticated User

Returns current user profile information.

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "user": {
    "id": "user_id",
    "name": "John Doe",
    "email": "john@example.com",
    "youtubeConnected": true,
    "language": "en"
  }
}
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required

item.name: 👤 User Profile Management
item.description:
## User Profile & Settings

Complete user profile management including YouTube integration and preferences.

### 📋 Profile Features
- **Account Information**: Name, email, avatar
- **YouTube Integration**: Channel connection status
- **Preferences**: Language, notifications, settings
- **Usage Analytics**: Reports, API calls, storage

request.description:
### 📊 Get Complete User Profile

Returns comprehensive user profile with all settings and integrations.

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "user": {
    "id": "user_id",
    "name": "John Doe",
    "email": "john@example.com",
    "youtubeConnected": true,
    "youtubeChannelTitle": "My Channel",
    "youtubeChannelThumbnail": "https://...",
    "language": "en",
    "emailNotifications": true,
    "createdAt": "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required

### ✏️ Update User Profile

Updates user profile information.

#### ✅ Request Body
```json
{
  "name": "string (optional)",
  "email": "string (optional)"
}
```

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "message": "Profile updated successfully",
  "user": {
    "name": "Updated Name",
    "email": "newemail@example.com"
  }
}
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required

item.name: 📺 YouTube Integration
item.description:
## YouTube Channel Integration

Complete YouTube API integration with OAuth 2.0 authentication and data synchronization.

### 🔗 Integration Features
- **OAuth 2.0 Flow**: Secure YouTube authentication
- **Channel Data**: Complete channel information
- **Video Catalog**: All videos with metadata
- **Comments**: Full comment threads
- **Analytics**: Performance metrics and insights

### 📊 Data Points
- Channel info, videos, comments, analytics
- Real-time synchronization
- Performance metrics

request.description:
### 🔗 Initiate YouTube OAuth

Starts YouTube OAuth 2.0 flow to connect user's channel.

#### 🔄 OAuth Flow
1. Redirect to Google consent screen
2. User grants permissions
3. Redirect back with authorization code
4. Exchange code for access tokens
5. Fetch and store channel data

#### 📤 Response (302 Redirect)
```http
Location: https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth?...
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required

#### 📋 Required Scopes
- `youtube.readonly`
- `youtubepartner`
- `youtube.force-ssl`

### 🔌 Disconnect YouTube Channel

Removes YouTube integration and clears all related data.

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "message": "YouTube channel disconnected successfully"
}
```

#### 🗑️ Data Cleanup
- Channel information removed
- Video data deleted
- OAuth tokens revoked
- Cache cleared

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required

### 📊 Get YouTube Connection Status

Returns YouTube integration status and channel information.

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "connected": true,
  "channel": {
    "id": "UC1234567890",
    "title": "My Channel",
    "thumbnail": "https://...",
    "subscriberCount": 10000
  }
}
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required

### 📹 Get Channel Videos

Returns all videos from connected YouTube channel.

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "videos": [
    {
      "id": "video123",
      "title": "My Video",
      "thumbnail": "https://...",
      "publishedAt": "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z",
      "viewCount": 1000,
      "likeCount": 50,
      "commentCount": 25
    }
  ]
}
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required
- YouTube channel must be connected

### 💬 Get Video Comments

Retrieves comments for a specific video with sentiment analysis.

#### 🔍 Query Parameters
- `videoId` (required): YouTube video ID

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "comments": [
    {
      "id": "comment123",
      "text": "Great video!",
      "author": "John",
      "publishedAt": "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z",
      "likeCount": 5,
      "sentiment": "positive",
      "sentimentScore": 0.85
    }
  ]
}
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required
- YouTube channel must be connected

### 📊 Get Channel Analytics

Returns comprehensive channel statistics and analytics.

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "channelStats": {
    "totalSubscribers": 10000,
    "totalViews": 1000000,
    "totalVideos": 50,
    "avgViewsPerVideo": 20000,
    "engagementRate": 0.05,
    "growthRate": 0.1
  },
  "sentimentAnalysis": {
    "totalComments": 5000,
    "avgSentimentScore": 0.75,
    "positiveComments": 3500,
    "neutralComments": 1200,
    "negativeComments": 300
  }
}
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required
- YouTube channel must be connected

item.name: 🤖 AI-Powered Features
item.description:
## Artificial Intelligence Features

Advanced AI capabilities for content analysis, generation, and insights.

### 🧠 AI Capabilities
- **Sentiment Analysis**: Advanced NLP for comment sentiment
- **Smart Replies**: Contextual response generation
- **Idea Generation**: AI-powered content suggestions
- **Video Reports**: Comprehensive analysis reports
- **Chat Assistant**: Interactive AI chat for insights

### 📊 AI Models
- OpenAI GPT-4 for text generation
- Custom sentiment analysis models
- Content recommendation algorithms
- Engagement prediction models

request.description:
### 💡 Generate Video Ideas

Creates AI-powered video content ideas based on channel analysis.

#### ✅ Request Body
```json
{
  "count": "number (default: 5)",
  "category": "string (optional)",
  "targetAudience": "string (optional)"
}
```

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "ideas": [
    {
      "title": "10 JavaScript Tips Every Beginner Should Know",
      "description": "Essential JavaScript tips and tricks for beginners...",
      "estimatedViews": "10K-50K",
      "difficulty": "beginner",
      "category": "tutorial",
      "keywords": ["javascript", "tips", "beginner"],
      "confidence": 0.85,
      "reasoning": "High engagement on similar content in your niche"
    },
    {
      "title": "Building Your First React App from Scratch",
      "description": "Complete guide to building a React application...",
      "estimatedViews": "15K-75K",
      "difficulty": "intermediate",
      "category": "project",
      "keywords": ["react", "project", "tutorial"],
      "confidence": 0.92,
      "reasoning": "React tutorials perform well in your channel analytics"
    }
  ],
  "metadata": {
    "totalIdeas": 5,
    "avgConfidence": 0.88,
    "basedOn": "channel_analytics",
    "generatedAt": "2024-01-20T14:30:00.000Z"
  }
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required
- YouTube channel must be connected

### 🤖 AI Chat Assistant

Interactive AI assistant for channel analytics and insights.

#### ✅ Request Body
```json
{
  "message": "string",
  "context": "string (optional)"
}
```

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "response": "Based on your channel analytics, your best performing video is 'JavaScript Basics for Beginners' with 50K views and a 92% positive sentiment score. The high performance is due to clear explanations, good pacing, and addressing a common pain point for beginners in your audience.",
  "data": {
    "videoId": "video123",
    "title": "JavaScript Basics for Beginners",
    "views": 50000,
    "sentimentScore": 0.92,
    "engagementRate": 0.08
  },
  "confidence": 0.94,
  "sources": ["channel_analytics", "comment_analysis", "performance_data"]
}
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required
- YouTube channel must be connected

item.name: ⚙️ Dashboard & Settings
item.description:
## Dashboard Settings & Configuration

Complete settings management for user preferences, notifications, and app configuration.

### 📋 Settings Categories
- **Notifications**: Email and push notification preferences
- **Language**: Multi-language support (23+ languages)
- **Privacy**: Data sharing and privacy settings
- **Appearance**: Theme and display preferences
- **API**: API keys and integration settings

### 🌍 Supported Languages
- English, Hindi, Gujarati, Marathi, Punjabi, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam, Kannada, Oriya, Assamese, Urdu, Kashmiri, Nepali, Konkani, Maithili, Sanskrit, Dogri, Bodo, Manipuri, Santali, Goan Konkani

request.description:
### ⚙️ Get User Settings

Returns all user settings and preferences.

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "user": {
    "id": "user_id",
    "name": "John Doe",
    "email": "john@example.com",
    "emailNotifications": true,
    "weeklyDigest": false,
    "negativeSentimentAlerts": true,
    "youtubeConnected": true,
    "language": "en"
  },
  "settings": {
    "language": "en",
    "theme": "light",
    "timezone": "UTC"
  },
  "usage": {
    "reportsGenerated": 12,
    "reportsLimit": 1000,
    "plan": "Pro",
    "planStatus": "Active",
    "price": "$19/month",
    "nextBilling": "Oct 12, 2024"
  }
}
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required

### ✏️ Update User Settings

Updates user preferences and settings.

#### ✅ Request Body
```json
{
  "emailNotifications": "boolean",
  "weeklyDigest": "boolean",
  "negativeSentimentAlerts": "boolean",
  "language": "string (language code)",
  "theme": "string (light/dark)"
}
```

#### 🌍 Supported Languages
- `en` - English
- `hi` - Hindi
- `gu` - Gujarati
- `mr` - Marathi
- `pa` - Punjabi
- `bn` - Bengali
- `ta` - Tamil
- `te` - Telugu
- `ml` - Malayalam
- `kn` - Kannada
- And 15 more Indian languages

#### 📤 Response (200 OK)
```json
{
  "message": "Settings updated successfully",
  "settings": {
    "emailNotifications": true,
    "weeklyDigest": false,
    "negativeSentimentAlerts": false,
    "language": "hi",
    "theme": "dark"
  }
}
```

#### 🔒 Authentication Required
- JWT token required

exec: // Auto-set JWT token from cookie if available

variable.description:
🌐 API Base URL

Development: http://localhost:3000
Production: https://api.axionix.ai

🔐 JWT Authentication Token

Auto-populated from axion_auth cookie after login. Can be set manually for testing.

📺 YouTube Video ID

Default: Rick Astley video for testing.
Replace with actual video IDs from your channel.

📺 YouTube Channel ID

Default: Example channel ID.
Replace with your actual YouTube channel ID.

📊 Request Counter

Auto-incremented for debugging and analytics tracking.

⏰ Request Timestamp

Auto-set to ISO timestamp for each request.
